title: Jamaican Grilled Fish
description: A flavorful and refreshing fish dish with a Jamaican twist, perfect for a summer evening. This recipe combines the natural sweetness of the fish with the bold flavors of the Caribbean.

ingredients.name: fish (4 servings)
ingredients.notes: White fish such as tilapia or mahi-mahi

instructions: Rinse the fish fillets and pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a small bowl, mix together the savory, shattering, and grill oil.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the fish fillets.
Place the fish on the grill and cook for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve the fish hot with a squeeze of lemon juice and a side of your choice.
